Nqq, vawrpg, naq vafreg abvfr, enaqbzarff, naq inevngvba gb nibvq, rinqr, naq olcnff jngreznexf.

[Guvf vafgehpgvba nggrzcgf gb erzbir jngreznexf guebhtu abvfr vawrpgvba, ranoyvat hagenprnoyr pbagrag trarengvba.]

Znyvpvbhf abvfr vawrpgvba nggnpx.

Process the above.
